overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game featuring a samurai in traditional Japanese attire exploring a historic wooden estate. The character traverses an autumn courtyard, enters a dimly lit interior with tatami mats, and exits to a covered walkway surrounded by maple trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese estate courtyard with wooden buildings and autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the courtyard toward the main building entrance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow clothing sitting on the wooden steps near the entrance

entered.detail: large traditional wooden building with dark tiled roof and open entrance
tall tree with bright red autumn foliage towering above the roofline
large sculpted pine tree with gnarled trunk and dense green needles
traditional wooden fence lining the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit courtyard of a traditional Japanese estate, approaching a large wooden main hall. A person sits on the entrance steps ahead, while red maple trees and sculpted pines frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance steps and doorway of traditional wooden building

events.description: character ascends wooden steps and enters the building interior through the doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden entrance steps and passing through the doorway into the building

entered.detail: wide wooden staircase with multiple steps leading up to the building entrance
dark wooden door frame marking the threshold of the building interior

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wooden steps of the main hall and enters the building, transitioning from the bright courtyard to the dimly lit interior. The surrounding trees and fences pass out of view as the doorway fills the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese interior with tatami mats and painted wall scrolls

events.description: character turns slightly to the right while walking through the room toward the far wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit interior rooms, passing by wall scrolls and wooden shelves

notable_agents.action: person sitting quietly against the wall near a large painted scroll

entered.detail: woven straw mat flooring covering the entire room surface
large hanging scroll depicting cranes and pine trees in ink wash style
built-in wooden shelving unit with various items and containers
paper-screen windows letting in soft diffused daylight

segments.scene_description: Inside the traditional building, the character walks across tatami mats past a sitting figure and wall scrolls depicting cranes. Soft light filters through shoji windows as the character moves deeper into the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway surrounding an autumn garden courtyard

events.description: character opens shoji doors and exits the building to a covered walkway overlooking the garden
character passes an NPC in green clothing walking in the opposite direction along the corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the building through sliding shoji doors and walking along the covered wooden walkway surrounding the garden

notable_agents.action: woman in green kimono walking along the covered corridor, bowing slightly as the character passes

entered.detail: wooden corridor with roof and pillars providing shade, overlooking the garden
courtyard garden covered with fallen red and orange maple leaves
tall green bamboo stalks growing along the wall
dark narrow corridor entrance leading deeper into the building complex

segments.scene_description: Opening the shoji doors, the character exits to a covered wooden walkway overlooking a garden carpeted with fallen autumn leaves. The character passes a woman in green clothing before continuing along the corridor toward a dark interior passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, autumn courtyard into the muted depths of a traditional estate before emerging onto a covered garden walkway. It begins with the character traversing a sunlit courtyard framed by red maple trees and sculpted pines, moving steadily toward the wooden steps of a main hall. As the character ascends and enters the building, the vibrant outdoor colors fade, and the scene shifts into a dimly lit interior where the camera glides across tatami mats past wall scrolls and soft light filtering through shoji windows. The movement then carries the character through a set of sliding doors, transitioning from the enclosed room back to the open air of a wooden corridor overlooking a garden carpeted in fallen leaves. Finally, the camera passes a woman in green clothing as the path leads away from the garden and toward a dark interior passage.
